title: 二大委員長の図書検査

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Bakushin O! A great responsibility lies
on our shoulders today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I fully understand! A number of unauthorized
books have been reportedly spotted in the school
library, and it's up to us class representatives to
investigate!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Completely on the mark! It's our call to decide
whether those books infringe on academy rules!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Now, first up is this book. It's a horror titled, Evil's Banquet. Oh, there's a tagline, "Satanic one-liners to put you in shivers! On sacrificial sale now!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let me see... "Satan is sent to hell for the grave
sin of getting too wild at the bar. Disgruntled at
this unreasonable sentence, he puts a curse on
the land of the living."

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There, we meet our tale's protagonist, a man who
has cheated on his wife. But when the truth is
revealed, she hires an assassin for revenge.
Meanwhile, thirteen messengers born from Satan's
curse perform a series of ghastly acts...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Reading this nonsense will do nothing but
rot your brain! I'll let the disciplinary committee
take care of this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...No! As class representative, I think this book
should stay!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What?! Why?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
While I don't understand all the details... I sense
something very Bakushin about this book!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
For instance, in the scene where the protagonist
and his wife are trying to escape the zombie
army, their car engine gives out, and they're
unfortunately forced to run three-legged because
a snake is tied around their legs!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And how single-mindedly steadfast Satan clings
to his sense of humor, cracking joke after joke at
Bakushin speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's all so Bakushin! Considering the book as a whole, I believe it's valuable material for conveying Bakushin spirit!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Maybe there's some hidden passion
between the lines of its story, but... I find it too
strange to be left on school grounds.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Like you say, there may be some problematic
elements in the story! However, I think this book
can act as a teaching aid, warning students not to
play pranks!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Think of the various takeaways students could
obtain through reading this story... Don't you
think that makes for great education?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Hm, I see. You're always so insightful, Bakushin
O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha! You flatter me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: We'll keep this book, for now! The next one up for consideration is, 666 Legends: Reckless Romance at the End of the World.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Too much eavesdropping and I'll probably give
myself a headache. I better leave while I can...
